Package org.sosy_lab.java_smt.api

Interface FloatingPointRoundingModeFormula

All Superinterfaces:
Formula
@Immutable public interface FloatingPointRoundingModeFormula extends Formula
Formula representing a rounding mode for floating-point operations.

Rounding mode formulas are used by floating-point formulas to select the rounding mode for the operation. Use FloatingPointFormulaManager.makeRoundingMode(FloatingPointRoundingMode) to wrap a FloatingPointRoundingMode value inside a new formula.

This class is rarely used in the API but necessary to support visitor traversal of formulas with certain floating-point operations, where JavaSMT provides the rounding mode as Formula-based argument.

  • Method Summary
